import React from "react"; import menkesLogo from "../../images/menkeslogo.webp"; import solmarLogo from "../../images/solmarlogo.webp"; import tributeLogo from "../../images/tributelogo.png"; const metrics = [ { k: "10+", label: "Years on enterprise sites", body: "Hands-on experience as a Site Superintendent on high-rise residential and mixed-use developments.", }, { k: "$50M+", label: "Cumulative project budgets", body: "Direct oversight of multi-million dollar scopes from foundation through deficiency closeout.", }, { k: "On-Time", label: "Timeline & logistics", body: "Critical-path scheduling, trade coordination, and city inspection handling honed at scale.", }, ]; export default function Experience() { return (
Our Roots

An enterprise pedigree, brought home.

Sunwest Builds was founded on a decade of work for Canada's most rigorous developers. That same discipline now lives inside every residential project we touch.

Background with
